raw.ability details: * Healing from Siphon Blaster is not reduced by the global healing reduction passive. * Each shot generates 10% heat, so 10 shots will overheat. ** Heat dissipates at 20%-35% per second (based on remaining heat) *** Heat dissipates after a 0.25 second delay. ** Ends early if the weapon overheats (reaches 100% heat) * Can only lifesteal from players and [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]]. * Cooldown begins once exiting Siphon Blaster.

30 - 9 (light round area of effect)

raw.ability details:
* Use primary fire to fire light rounds and secondary fire to fire heavy rounds.
** All rounds are explosive, but only the heavy rounds deal self-damage to Emre.
* There is a slight cooldown between consecutive heavy round shots.
** You can shoot 3 light round shots between heavy round shots, during their cooldown.
